summary: Completed comprehensive UI/UX testing for NoMoreScamCalls site. Tested 5 specific implementation tasks: Hero CTA scrolling, HowItWorks hover effects, ShieldCheck icon usage, FinalCTA content updates, and CTA wiring to #bundles. 10 out of 11 requirements are working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: CTASection component is imported but not rendered on the homepage
ui_bugs.details: CTASection is imported in App.jsx line 16 but not used in HomePage component (lines 36-84)

passed_tests: Hero 'Get Protected' button scrolls to #bundles section
HowItWorks cards have hover glow effect (translateY -3px, yellow box-shadow)
FinalCTA heading is 'Ready to Stop Scam Calls for Good?'
FinalCTA subheading mentions 'phones, texts, email, and web'
FinalCTA primary button says 'Start 7-Day Free Trial'
FinalCTA secondary button says 'See How It Works'
FinalCTA footer says '7 days free, then just $15.99/month. Cancel anytime. No contracts.'
ComparisonTable CTA scrolls to #bundles and says 'Ready to stop scam calls?' not 'upgrade'
No 'upgrade' wording found anywhere on the page
action_item_for_main_agent: Add CTASection component to the HomePage component in /app/frontend/src/App.jsx if it should be displayed on the page, or remove the import if it's not needed
